meta.title: How dangerous is China's H-20 stealth bomber?
meta.description:
Just recently, China’s Global Times reported on an impending test flight of a strategically important aircraft. This prompted a slew of predictions that the nation’s first stealth bomber, commonly known as the Xian H-20, may soon be unveiled. 

If true, the H-20 would be the world’s first publicly disclosed non-American stealth bomber ever to fly, and could usher in a new era of strategic airpower competition.
